groundTruthStatus: VALIDATED 2026-06-04 PO (szymonwal) — 50-query acceptance set. q01–q15 frozen in TASK-017; q16–q50 proposed by the agent from reading the codebase (anti-bias: NOT derived from embedder results), reviewed and approved by the PO incl. round-1 ground-truth widening of q18/q34/q35/q39. Safe to freeze.
notes: Queries are English to match the English embedder (Xenova/bge-small-en-v1.5); `concept` carries the PL label.
expectedFiles are repo-relative paths; a hit = any expected file appears in the top-k search results.
Coverage: web (5), mobile (28), wiki (3), tools (14) = 50. Extended in this pass with mobile + tools/rag-mcp queries.
ANTI-BIAS: ground truth for q16–q50 was chosen by reading the source (grep by concept → authoritative file), never from search results; PO-validated 2026-06-04 before freezing.

PO review round 1 (szymonwal): widened q18 (+storage index.model.ts), q34 (+message-item, +messages list view), q35 (+messages list view), q39 (+logger index.model.ts) — each addition is a file that structurally implements the concept (co-located module definition or hosting view), decided from code structure, not from what the embedder returned.
